# Prophet

> Prophet is an AI-powered Chrome extension that integrates Anthropic Claude AI into the browser side panel for real-time chat, web page analysis, and browser automation.

## Key Facts
- Chrome extension with side panel UI
- Supports Claude Haiku 4.5, Sonnet 4.6, and Opus 4.6
- 18 browser automation tools via Chrome DevTools Protocol
- Uses accessibility tree (not screenshots) for page understanding
- Pay-per-use credits: Free ($0.20), Pro ($9.99/mo), Premium ($29.99/mo), Ultra ($59.99/mo)
- Real-time streaming responses
- Open source: https://github.com/ThanosKa/prophet

## Links
- Homepage: https://prophetchrome.com
- Chrome Web Store: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/prophet/febgdmgcdimmjfkfblbpjmkjfepmfkif
- How It Works: https://prophetchrome.com/how-it-works
- Pricing: https://prophetchrome.com/pricing
- FAQ: https://prophetchrome.com/faq
